name: Deep Work: Rules for Focused Success
description: Cal Newport's guide to cultivating the ability to focus without distraction and produce at an elite level.

reviews.title: Changed how I work completely
reviews.reviewText: Newport makes a compelling case for deep work and provides actionable strategies to achieve it. I restructured my mornings after reading this and my output quality improved noticeably. A must-read for anyone in a knowledge-based field.

reviews.title: Practical and persuasive
reviews.reviewText: Well-argued book backed by real examples. The strategies around time blocking and minimising shallow work are immediately actionable. I return to it every year as a reminder.

reviews.title: Insightful but repetitive at times
reviews.reviewText: The core thesis is powerful and Newport articulates it well. The middle section can feel a bit padded, but the rules section is practical. Well worth reading for the ideas alone.
